title: View medical categories list after login
description: Verifies an authenticated user can access Medical Categories and see the categories list load.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu

title: Search categories by keyword and open category details
description: Verifies keyword search filters results and selecting a category shows its details and linked services.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu
Type "lab" into the category search field
Verify element "Categories results list" is visible
Click on the first category in the results list

title: Search with no matches shows empty state message
description: Verifies entering a search that yields no results displays a clear "No categories found" state.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu
Type "zzzz-no-such-category" into the category search field
Verify text "No categories found" is visible
Verify element "Categories results list" is not visible

title: Clear search restores category list results
description: Verifies that clearing the search input returns the view to showing available categories.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu
Type "zzzz-no-such-category" into the category search field
Verify text "No categories found" is visible
Click on the clear (X) icon in the category search field
Verify element "Categories results list" is visible

title: Category details show hierarchy information
description: Verifies selecting a category displays key hierarchy cues such as parent/child relationships or breadcrumb information when available.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first category in the categories list

title: Category details show linked services list (if present)
description: Verifies that linked services are visible on the category details view and can be inspected on-screen.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu
Type "service" into the category search field
Click on the first category in the results list

title: Search is resilient to leading/trailing spaces
description: Verifies search still returns results when the keyword includes extra spaces.

steps.description: Click on "Medical Categories" in the main navigation menu
Type "  lab  " into the category search field
Verify element "Categories results list" is visible
Verify text "No categories found" is not visible

title: Accept a claim from the Claims list and verify status updates to Accepted
description: Verifies a reviewer can open a claim from the list, accept it, and see confirmation with updated status.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Submitted claims list" is visible

title: Open a claim from the list and verify claim details page is displayed
description: Verifies a reviewer can select a claim and view its details before taking action.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Submitted claims list" is visible
Click on the first claim in the claims list

title: Accept a claim from the claim details view and verify confirmation is shown
description: Verifies the Accept/Approve action from claim details shows a confirmation and reflects the new status.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click on the first claim in the claims list

title: Attempt to approve a claim without visitId and verify validation error is shown
description: Verifies approving a claim fails with a visible validation error when mandatory visitId is missing and status does not change.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click on a claim in the claims list that is missing a visitId

title: Verify claim remains in current state after visitId validation error
description: Verifies that after the missing visitId error, the claim status does not change to Accepted.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click on a claim in the claims list that is missing a visitId

title: Claims list loads and displays submitted claims
description: Verifies the Claims page loads successfully and shows a list of submitted claims for review.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Verify element "Submitted claims list" is visible

title: Claims list empty state is shown when no submitted claims are available
description: Verifies an empty-state message is displayed when the claims list has no records.

steps.description: Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu

title: Register a member visit from Members list
description: Verifies a provider can find a member and successfully register a visit with required details.
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Type a known member identifier (e.g., member name or member number available in the test environment) into the member search field
Press "Enter" key to run the search
Verify at least one member result row is visible
Click the first member in the results list
Type "VISIT-REG-001" into the Visit ID field
Type "Routine consultation" into the visit details/notes field

title: Create and submit a new claim for a registered visit with taxonomy-selected service
description: Verifies a provider can create a new claim, select a registered visit, add services from the taxonomy catalog, and submit successfully.
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Select a registered visit from the list
Verify the selected visit is shown on the claim form
Select a service from the taxonomy catalog list
Verify the selected service appears in the services list for the claim

title: Block claim submission when no visit is selected and visitId is missing
description: Verifies the claim form enforces mandatory visit selection/visitId and prevents submission when missing.
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Verify text "visitId is MANDATORY" is visible
Verify text "Claim submitted" is not visible

title: Prevent adding a service via free-text entry (must use catalog)
description: Verifies the service selection control rejects free-text services and shows the expected validation error.
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Verify a service input field is visible
Type "My Custom Service" into the service input field
Click the "Add Service" confirmation button (e.g., "Add" or "Save Service")
Verify text "Service must be selected from catalog" is visible

title: Submit claim with selected visit but no services (expect validation to block)
description: Verifies the system prevents claim submission when required claim content (services) is missing.
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Select a registered visit from the list
Verify the selected visit is shown on the claim form
Verify text indicating a required services validation error is visible
Verify text "Claim submitted" is not visible

title: Create claim: ensure taxonomy service selection does not allow arbitrary entry after typing search text
description: Verifies that even when typing into a service search box, the final service must be chosen from the catalog options (not arbitrary text).
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Select a registered visit from the list
Verify the selected visit is shown on the claim form
Verify a service catalog list is visible
Type "consult" into the service search field
Verify at least one catalog option matching the search is visible
Select one of the visible catalog options
Verify the selected service appears in the claim services list

title: Cancel out of New Claim without submitting (no submitted confirmation)
description: Verifies that leaving the new claim form via cancel/back does not submit a claim and does not show a submission confirmation.
category: Provider Portal - Visit Registration & Claims Submission

steps.description: Verify text "New Claim" or "Create Claim" is visible
Click "Cancel" or "Back" on the claim form
Verify text "Claim submitted" is not visible

title: View member profile with eligibility and benefit policy summary (search by name)
description: Ensures a user can find a member by name, open the profile, and view eligibility and benefit policy summary details.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type a valid existing member name into the member search field

title: View member profile with eligibility and benefit policy summary (search by member ID)
description: Ensures a user can search by member ID, select a result, and view eligibility and benefit policy summary on the member profile.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type a valid existing member ID into the member search field
Verify at least one member result row is visible

title: Select a member from search results and verify profile sections are visible
description: Verifies that selecting a member from results opens a profile view with visible eligibility and benefit policy summary sections.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type a valid existing member name into the member search field
Click on the first member in the results list

title: Verify benefit policy summary includes key benefit fields
description: Confirms that the member profile shows benefit policy summary details such as co-pay and limits as visible text labels.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type a valid existing member ID into the member search field
Click on the first member in the results list

title: Search for a non-existent member and see "Member not found" state
description: Ensures the UI shows a clear not-found message or empty-state when searching for a non-existent member.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type "ZZZ-NO-SUCH-MEMBER-999999" into the member search field
Verify text "Member not found" is visible

title: Search with an empty query and verify list remains usable
description: Validates that leaving the search empty does not break the members page and a list or default state is still visible.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Click into the member search field
Verify the members results list or table is visible

title: Search supports partial name and returns results
description: Ensures partial member name search returns results and allows selection.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type a partial valid member name (e.g., first 3 letters) into the member search field
Verify at least one member result row is visible
Click on the first member in the results list

title: Member profile shows eligibility status as visible text
description: Checks that the member profile visibly presents an eligibility status/state for coverage validation.

steps.description: Click on "Members" in the main navigation menu
Type a valid existing member name into the member search field
Click on the first member in the results list
Verify an eligibility status value is visible (e.g., "Eligible" or "Not eligible")

title: Submit a Draft claim and verify state update plus audit entry
description: Verifies a Draft claim can be transitioned to Submitted and an audit trail entry is visible for the action.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Draft"

title: From claim details, change state to Submitted and verify audit entry text is visible
description: Verifies the claim details page allows changing state to Submitted and shows a visible audit trail entry for the change.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Draft"

title: Verify Submitted state is shown after changing state from Draft
description: Verifies that after changing a Draft claim to Submitted, the new state is visible on the claim details view.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Draft"
Select "Submitted" from the claim state dropdown

title: Verify audit trail includes an entry after submitting a claim
description: Verifies that submitting a claim results in a visible audit trail record for the action.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Draft"
Select "Submitted" from the claim state dropdown

title: Open an Approved claim and confirm financial fields are locked or not editable
description: Verifies that when a claim is Approved, the financial amounts are not editable on the UI (immutability enforced).
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Approved"

title: Attempt to modify financial amounts on an Approved claim and see lock error on Save
description: Verifies that saving financial changes on an Approved claim is blocked with the visible error message.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Approved"
Fill "999" into the allowed amount (or equivalent financial amount) field

title: Verify error text 'Financials locked after approval' is visible and values are not changed
description: Verifies that the financial lock error is shown and the page still indicates the claim is Approved with no visible confirmation of successful save.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Approved"
Fill "999" into the allowed amount (or equivalent financial amount) field
Verify text "Financials locked after approval" is visible

title: After a blocked financial save on an Approved claim, verify audit trail does not show a success entry
description: Verifies that an attempted financial modification on an Approved claim does not create a visible 'saved' audit event entry.
category: Claims Workflow, Financial Immutability & Audit Trail

steps.description: Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the username or email field
Click on "Claims" in the main navigation menu
Click a claim in the claims list that shows state "Approved"
Verify text "Financials locked after approval" is visible
